constructor

  • new BalatroModel(): BalatroModel

  • Desc

    Initialises the game with the fixed Small Blind configuration, shuffles the deck and deals 8 cards.

    Returns BalatroModel

    • Defined in home-work/balatro-model.ts:34

sortHandByRankDescending

  • sortHandByRankDescending(): void

  • Desc

    Sorts the current hand cards from highest to lowest (Ace highest), and clears any selection because indices have changed.

    Returns void
